message: The pull request body must contain all eight required sections as level-2 headings (## Purpose, ## Scope, ## Out of scope, ## Risk, ## Validation, ## Review, ## Files of interest, ## Claude involvement), each filled with real content. A section counts as empty if it contains only the template's angle-bracket placeholder prompts (e.g. <why this change exists>) or whitespace. Each section must ALSO carry an Impact line filled with the one-line consequence — the sentence a reviewer reads first — not left as the `<...>` template placeholder and not removed. This is how a reviewer who cannot read code gets a complete, structured account of the change. The check confirms each section is present and filled and that its Impact line is really written; it cannot judge whether the content is accurate, honest, or earns confidence — that is the reviewer's job. Fill any flagged section, and its Impact line, with a substantive description before merging.
